description: Positive reassembly vectors. The label-309 value is a definite-length CBOR array of definite-length byte strings of 1 to 64 bytes (zero-length tolerated on read); in-order byte concatenation of the elements is the record body. Two transport arrays whose concatenations are byte-identical denote the same record.

vectors.name: single-chunk-63-byte-body
vectors.note: A body of 64 bytes or fewer is still carried as a chunk array — here one element. The chunk-array form is required regardless of body length.

vectors.name: minimal-split-32-31
vectors.note: An arbitrary split; chunk boundaries carry no semantic meaning.

vectors.name: zero-length-chunks-tolerated
vectors.note: Zero-length chunks contribute no bytes and MUST NOT be rejected: chunk boundaries are semantics-free, including degenerate ones.

vectors.name: one-byte-chunks
vectors.note: Maximal over-chunking (63 one-byte chunks) reassembles identically; producers SHOULD use the minimal split but verifiers accept any.
